title: Once Forgotten
description: A mod intending to expand on Minecraft lore!
body:
__"*The past can never truly be forgotten. History always repeats itself....."  
-An entry from a journal found during excavation of a stronghold library*__





Welcome to Once Forgotten! The main goal this little pet project of mine has is to expand Minecraft lore using new items, mobs and blocks to do so. Throughout your adventures here, you may find new blocks, mobs and ores to aid you in your journey across what seems to be an ever-evolving world!

 

For example, the Worldforge is a necessary piece of ancient (and future) history found within the End. Inside lies many new items and blocks for you to uncover.

 

What will you find?

**The Worldforge and Factorus Mechanus lie in wait, structures meant to be found by explorers of today....Clockwork Mechanisms and Tempus Crystal items are ready to be used in new forms of Redstone.......and Scrapped Metal, debris from long ago, is begging to be smithed into Uru Ingots for the Tools of War.**

(A wiki will be up in a matter of time to explain the full extent of this mod! In the meantime, I reccomend using EMI or something similar to find crafting recipes and have a look at some of the new items.)
